title: strigilia alba
intro: Strigilia alba, also known as the White Strigilia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae and is native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Strigilia alba include reducing inflammation, fighting bacterial infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Strigilia alba include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health issues.
